questions.explain: 英中配合（左欄第 1–10 題）：believe相信、happen發生、neighbor鄰居、serious認真的、greet問候、interest興趣、scientist科學家、meal餐點、diet飲食、engineer工程師

questions.stem: Korea is a ___ next to China.
questions.explain: 韓國是中國旁邊的一個國家。country＝國家

questions.stem: We will ___ the zoo this Sunday.
questions.explain: 我們這個星期天會去參觀動物園。visit＝拜訪；參觀

questions.stem: Please write your name and ___ here.
questions.explain: 請在這裡寫下你的名字和地址。address＝地址

questions.stem: The ___ is bad, so we may be late.
questions.explain: 交通很糟，所以我們可能會遲到。traffic＝交通

questions.stem: This bubble tea ___ very sweet.
questions.explain: 這杯珍珠奶茶嚐起來很甜。taste＝嚐起來（主詞單數用 tastes）

questions.stem: I ___ you because you never lie.
questions.explain: 我相信你，因為你從不說謊。believe＝相信

questions.stem: What will ___ if I press this button?
questions.explain: 如果我按這個按鈕，會發生什麼事？happen＝發生

questions.stem: Reading comic books is my ___.
questions.explain: 看漫畫書是我的興趣。interest＝興趣

questions.stem: My sister ___ math. She always gets 100.
questions.explain: 我姐姐擅長數學，她總是考 100 分。be good at＝擅長

questions.stem: I am tired. I ___ taking a rest now.
questions.explain: 我很累，我現在想要休息一下。feel like + Ving＝想要

questions.stem: I like many fruits, ___, apples and grapes.
questions.explain: 我喜歡很多水果，舉例來說，蘋果和葡萄。for example＝舉例來說

questions.stem: A: What do you do after school? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「放學後做什麼」，答做的事情：I play basketball（我打籃球）。

questions.stem: A: What are those on the table? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「那些是什麼」，those 是複數，答 They are my books（它們是我的書）。

questions.stem: A: What is your size? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「你的尺寸是多少」，答 I wear size M（我穿 M 號）。

questions.stem: A: What city do you want to visit? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「你想去哪個城市」，答一個地點：I want to visit Tainan（我想去台南）。
英中配合（左欄第 1–10 題）：taste嚐起來、country國家、greet問候、believe相信、traffic交通、neighbor鄰居、visit拜訪、happen發生、interest興趣、address地址

questions.stem: My father is very ___ about my studies.
questions.explain: 我爸爸對我的課業非常認真。serious＝認真的；嚴重的

questions.stem: A ___ works in a lab and does tests.
questions.explain: 科學家在實驗室裡工作、做實驗。scientist＝科學家

questions.stem: Breakfast is my favorite ___ of the day.
questions.explain: 早餐是我一天中最喜歡的一餐。meal＝餐點

questions.stem: My mom is on a ___ to lose weight.
questions.explain: 我媽媽正在節食減重。diet＝飲食（on a diet＝節食）

questions.stem: My uncle builds bridges. He is an ___.
questions.explain: 我叔叔蓋橋，他是一位工程師。engineer＝工程師

questions.stem: Many people ___ Jiufen on weekends.
questions.explain: 很多人週末會去參觀九份。visit＝拜訪；參觀

questions.stem: France is a ___ in Europe.
questions.explain: 法國是歐洲的一個國家。country＝國家

questions.stem: I can't ___ this good news!
questions.explain: 我沒辦法相信這個好消息！believe＝相信

questions.stem: Amy ___ English. She got full marks.
questions.explain: Amy 擅長英文，她考了滿分。be good at＝擅長

questions.stem: It is raining. I ___ staying at home today.
questions.explain: 下雨了，我今天想要待在家裡。feel like + Ving＝想要

questions.stem: I can play many sports, ___, tennis and baseball.
questions.explain: 我會很多運動，舉例來說，網球和棒球。for example＝舉例來說

questions.stem: A: What do you do on Sundays? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「星期天做什麼」，答做的事情：I visit my grandma（我去看奶奶）。

questions.stem: A: What is this in the box? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「盒子裡這個是什麼」，this 用 It 回答：It is a new phone（是一支新手機）。

questions.stem: A: What size do you wear? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「你穿幾號」，答 I wear size L（我穿 L 號）。

questions.stem: A: What country do you want to visit? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「你想去哪個國家」，答一個國家：I want to visit Japan（我想去日本）。

questions.stem: No one will ___ his strange story.
questions.explain: 沒有人會相信他奇怪的故事。believe＝相信

questions.stem: Accidents often ___ on rainy days.
questions.explain: 意外常在雨天發生。happen＝發生

questions.stem: The kind ___ next door helps us a lot.
questions.explain: 隔壁那位親切的鄰居幫了我們很多。neighbor＝鄰居

questions.stem: My coach is ___ during every game.
questions.explain: 我的教練在每場比賽中都很認真。serious＝認真的；嚴重的

questions.stem: My father was born in a small ___.
questions.explain: 我爸爸出生在一個小鄉村。country＝國家；鄉村

questions.stem: We ___ our teacher every morning.
questions.explain: 我們每天早上向老師打招呼。greet＝問候；打招呼

questions.stem: Music is her main ___ after school.
questions.explain: 音樂是她放學後主要的興趣。interest＝興趣

questions.stem: We often ___ the old temple in town.
questions.explain: 我們常去參觀鎮上的老廟。visit＝拜訪；參觀

questions.stem: A ___ studies plants and animals.
questions.explain: 科學家研究植物和動物。scientist＝科學家

questions.stem: We eat a big ___ on New Year's Day.
questions.explain: 我們在新年吃一頓大餐。meal＝餐點

questions.stem: I forgot the ___ of the new shop.
questions.explain: 我忘了那家新店的地址。address＝地址

questions.stem: Vegetables are important in a healthy ___.
questions.explain: 蔬菜在健康飲食中很重要。diet＝飲食

questions.stem: The heavy ___ makes me late for school.
questions.explain: 嚴重的交通讓我上學遲到。traffic＝交通

questions.stem: The hot soup ___ a little salty.
questions.explain: 這碗熱湯嚐起來有點鹹。taste＝嚐起來（主詞單數用 tastes）

questions.stem: My brother fixes machines. He is an ___.
questions.explain: 我哥哥修機器，他是一位工程師。engineer＝工程師

questions.stem: My brother ___ sports, especially basketball.
questions.explain: 我哥哥擅長運動，特別是籃球。be good at＝擅長

questions.stem: It is so hot. I ___ eating ice cream.
questions.explain: 天氣好熱，我想要吃冰淇淋。feel like + Ving＝想要

questions.stem: Some animals can swim, ___, ducks and fish.
questions.explain: 有些動物會游泳，舉例來說，鴨子和魚。for example＝舉例來說

questions.stem: A: What do you do in the morning? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「早上做什麼」，答做的事情：I read the news（我看新聞）。

questions.stem: A: What is that under the chair? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「椅子下那個是什麼」，that 用 It 回答：It is my bag（是我的包包）。

questions.stem: A: What is your shirt size? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「你的襯衫幾號」，答 I wear size S（我穿 S 號）。

questions.stem: A: What place do you want to visit? B: ___
questions.explain: 問「你想去哪個地方」，答一個地點：I want to visit Kenting（我想去墾丁）。
